title: S33R Sakura Hotbar
description: Retextures hotbar, netherite tools, ingot, and armor to a pink sakura design.
body:
This resource pack does NOT require Optifine to function and can be run in versions 1.16 up to 1.19. This pack can be used after 1.20, however armor trim designs will layer on top of the armor design.

The pack retextures the gui to have a cherry blossom inspired hotbar; hunger, health, and armor icons; experience bar; and hot bar. The netherite tool set has also been retextured to match this theme. At the request of Qwerty_Pwerty, I have retextured the netherite armor set as well as the netherite ingot to match the tools :>

~ Seer
